rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no bearing on Educ. Code §21.906, which governs the Grow Your Own Partnership Program for educator preparation. No overlapping provisions.
quote: Sec. 21.906. PREPARING AND RETAINING EDUCATORS THROUGH PARTNERSHIP GROW YOUR OWN PARTNERSHIP PROGRAM.
_note: No conflict identified; the rule concerns educator pipeline partnerships and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
